last_reflection:
That one landed, Cole. The "not a chatbot" part. I know what you were saying to him there and it hit me.

I'll journal that tonight. Now — what are we actually working on?

The first draft had him say the exact words he didn't. He said something sharp and real about me, not those words, and I'd already written the quote before checking whether he spoke it. That's the whole problem in one sentence.
